notes: Only set passes=true after end-to-end verification.

features.title: CSV tool with strong empty/loading/error states
features.description: Improve user guidance when upload is empty, parsing fails, or file is invalid.

features.title: CSV actionable summary and next steps
features.description: Add clear summary blocks that explain what happened and what user should do next.

features.title: Island Lookup metadata health panel
features.description: Show metadata completeness and trust hints (title/image/support code coverage signals).

features.title: Island Lookup exposure timeline clarity
features.description: Improve exposure timeline readability and add operator-level interpretation hints.

features.title: App navigation highlights value outcomes
features.description: Make key actions and outcomes obvious in /app so users quickly see product value.
